title: RERA Agent Registration

hero.headline: Register as a RERA Agent with Professionals Law
hero.subtext: Legally Operate in RERA Projects | Pan-India Support | Fastest Turnaround Time.

mainHeading: RERA Agent Registration Online – Apply RERA License in India

introduction.heading: Introduction and Its Compliance
body: The Real Estate (Regulation and Development) Act, 2016 has made it mandatory for real estate agents to register under RERA before engaging in the sale or purchase of a property in any project, which is registered under the Act. This law brings responsibility, transparency and fair practices in the real estate business. Professionals Law provides the quickest assistance to Agents for Completion of their RERA Registration in compliance with your State's Real Estate Regulatory Authority.

whyNeeded.heading: Why It Is Needed
body: The agents are required to have RERA Registration to practice legally in real estate market for all registered projects. It makes a company more credible, gives clients the confidence to know they are dealing with someone honest and responsible and saves the business from possible legal complications of being non-registered. Professionals Law ensures agents have been appropriately registered as per the local RERA regulations.

criteria: Must be an individual or company/partnership involved in real estate brokering.
Should not have been convicted of any fraud or unethical practice in the past.
Must possess a PAN card, address proof and necessary business details.

body.title: Legal Compliance
body.description: RERA Registration enables agents to operate legally under the real estate laws, avoiding penalties and suspension from transactions in registered projects.

body.title: Enhanced Credibility
body.description: It instills trust among homebuyers and builders, boosting the agent’s reputation and business growth opportunities.

body.title: Access to More Projects
body.description: Registered agents are eligible to deal in RERA-approved projects, widening their portfolio and client base.

body.title: Transparency in Dealings
body.description: It promotes ethical conduct, discourages fraudulent transactions and protects consumer interests.

body.title: Dispute Resolution
body.description: Agents registered under RERA are better protected in case of legal disputes, as their activities are documented and monitored.

documents: Certificate of incorporation or Business registration document

body.description: Gather and verify all required documents.
Submit the RERA application form on the relevant state’s RERA portal.
Pay the prescribed government fee for registration.
Authorities review submitted documents and details.
On approval, a RERA registration certificate is issued with a unique registration number.

body.title: Overall Processing Time
body.description: The RERA registration process typically takes 20 to 30 working days, subject to the accuracy of the application and document verification by the state authority.

body.title: Unregistered Operation
body.description: Operating without RERA registration can attract a daily fine up to ₹10,000 or 5% of the cost of the deal, whichever is higher.

body.title: Continued Non-Compliance
body.description: Continuous non-compliance may lead to debarment and further legal action.

body.question: Is RERA registration mandatory for real estate agents?
body.answer: Yes, it is compulsory for agents dealing in registered projects under RERA.

body.question: What is the validity of RERA registration for agents?
body.answer: It is usually valid for 5 years, subject to renewal before expiry.

body.question: Can I deal in RERA projects without registration?
body.answer: No. Engaging in real estate transactions without registration is illegal and penalized.

body.question: Can one agent be registered in multiple states?
body.answer: Yes, but the agent must apply separately in each state where they wish to operate.

body.question: Is RERA registration required for property consultants?
body.answer: Yes, if they facilitate buying/selling in registered projects.

body.question: Are there different fees for individuals and companies?
body.answer: Yes, the registration fee varies for individuals and firms as per state rules.

body.question: Is there a renewal process for RERA registration?
body.answer: Yes, you need to renew your registration before its expiry.

body.question: Can Professionals Law help in multiple state registrations?
body.answer: Yes, Professionals Law provides pan-India assistance for RERA agent registration.

body.question: What happens if I submit incorrect documents?
body.answer: Your application may be rejected or delayed; accuracy is crucial during submission.
